## Building

Production apps and tools I design, build, and ship, mostly solo, on a SwiftUI + Cloudflare Workers + Anthropic Claude stack.

**Products**

- **[LeaderShift](https://leadershift.app)** — AI reflection partner for leaders. SwiftUI iOS + Cloudflare Worker + Supabase. My largest codebase this year (+95K lines across the app and an executives fork).
- **[AI Recess](https://joinairecess.com)** — Community for AI builders, co-founded with two fellow creators. Landing, onboarding report-card quiz, and Supabase backend.
- **[AIppliance Manager](https://aippliancemanager.com)** — AI-assisted home appliance manager. Web + native iOS (SwiftUI).
- **[PackLlama](https://packllama.app)** — Smart packing companion for trips.
- **[Doughby](https://doughbyapp.com)** — Sourdough starter companion app. iOS + waitlist site.
- **Polk** — Expert-consensus synthesis engine for finance professionals. Cloudflare Workers + Hono + Claude, parallel-isolated panels with 1:1 streaming chat.
- **[AIpplied Labs](https://aippliedlabs.com)** — My AI engineering studio. Where the above get built.

**Open tools and repos**

- **[stardust](https://github.com/kjmagnan1s/stardust)** — Local search + markdown export for your GitHub stars. Claude Code skill + CLI.
- **[claude-skills](https://github.com/kjmagnan1s/claude-skills)** — Portable Claude Code skills I reuse across projects and machines.
- **[claude-md-creator](https://github.com/kjmagnan1s/claude-md-creator)** — Generate and audit `CLAUDE.md` project instruction files.

## Contributing to

Open-source work beyond my own repos. This list grows over time.

- **[printing-press-library](https://github.com/mvanhorn/printing-press-library)** — Contributed and merged three production CLIs to the community library: **Apify**, **ClickUp**, and **beehiiv**. More in progress.
